privileged_info_summary: The task implements a healthcare integration engine troubleshooting scenario using NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) version 4.5.0. The ADT_State_Normalizer channel processes HL7 v2.5 patient data and normalizes state codes. The task generates 20 synthetic HL7 ADT messages: 10 with valid state code 'CA' and 10 with invalid code 'XX'. The expected outcome is that all 20 messages are successfully delivered to the /home/ga/normalized_adt directory, with unknown state codes gracefully mapped to the fallback value 'UNKNOWN' after the agent fixes the JavaScript transformer logic to prevent crashes on unmapped values.
